_comment: DRIFT HERO (real). Binance — a real, well-documented deterioration: global growth → multi-jurisdiction enforcement → $4.3B DOJ settlement + founder steps down. Replaces the fabricated Meridian as the honest LOW/MED→HIGH case.
_real_vs_simulated: Events are REAL & publicly reported (URLs given; VERIFY exact dates/figures). The bank-side onboarding score, cadence and 'as an AMINA client' framing are SIMULATED.
purpose_of_relationship: Institutional account for a global crypto-asset exchange group (SIMULATED onboarding rationale).

risk_model._note: A large, fast-growing, lightly-regulated global crypto exchange onboards ELEVATED (MEDIUM). Real drift = escalating multi-jurisdiction enforcement + an ownership/control change.

kyc_review._note: Risk-based periodic review. MEDIUM band -> 24-month cadence.
kyc_review._derivation: MEDIUM -> 24mo -> 2019-01 + 24mo = 2021-01. The 2021 FCA ban / enforcement wave should pull this off-cycle.

entity_profile.principal_place_of_business: No single declared global headquarters (SIMULATED onboarding note)

Global retail & institutional; no single declared headquarters
Pursuing licences across jurisdictions; not yet broadly authorised
